## Describe the Bug

## To Reproduce

Steps to reproduce the behavior:
1. Place '...' block
2. Press '...' key
3. Drive/aim at '...'
4. See error

## Expected Behavior

What you expected to happen instead.

## Screenshots / Videos

If applicable, add screenshots or video links to help explain the issue.

## Environment

- **Minecraft version**: 1.21.1
- **Mod version**: [e.g. 1.0.0]

## Crash Log / Latest Log

Paste any relevant error messages here (not the full log unless short)
